nasb.text: Now these are their settlements according to their camps within their borders. To the sons of Aaron of the families of the Kohathites (for theirs was the first lot),

esv.text: These are their dwelling places according to their settlements within their borders: to the sons of Aaron of the clans of Kohathites, for theirs was the first lot,

cnv.text: 以下是在他們境內，他們按著營房居住的地方：哥轄族中亞倫的子孫抽中了籤，

ccb.text: 以下是哥辖族人亚伦的后代分到的地方： 他们抽中第一签，
